app.name: SEOSH.AI
app.description: Automate your SEO: from semantic core to content publishing

projectCreated.title: Project created
projectCreated.body: Your new project was set up.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your SEOSH.AI account

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.tryDemoHint: Sign in as a guest — view-only, no changes allowed
register.waitlistSubtitle: Registration is invite-only right now. Leave your email and we'll notify you when access opens.
register.name: Name
register.messageLabel: What do you want to test?
register.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what problems you're solving — we'll take it into account.
register.thanksBody: We'll reach out at {email} as soon as access opens.
register.privacyNotice: By submitting, you agree to the {privacy}. We don't share your email with third parties.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successBody: If an account with {email} exists, we've sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.invalidLinkBody: This password reset link is missing or invalid. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been successfully changed.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.expired: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.metaDescription: Semantic core, content plan, AI generation, SEO checks and WordPress publishing — in one platform.

hero.badge: Complete SEO cycle in one platform
hero.subtitle: Collect semantics, plan content, generate SEO-optimized text and publish it to WordPress — in minutes, not weeks.
hero.bonus: 2,000 tokens welcome bonus · No credit card required

features.title: What's inside
features.subtitle: Six modules cover the entire SEO cycle — from semantics to publishing and analytics.

semanticCore.title: Semantic Core
semanticCore.text: Upload keywords or build clusters — AI groups them into categories and pages.

contentPlan.title: Content Plan
contentPlan.text: Generate ideas, enrich SEO data, export to Excel or share via link.

aiGeneration.title: AI Generation
aiGeneration.text: Texts with H1/H2 outline, meta tags, keywords and uniqueness checks.

seoAnalysis.title: SEO Analysis
seoAnalysis.text: Uniqueness, spam score, E-E-A-T, readability — in real time via Text.ru and AI.

wordpress.title: WordPress Publishing
wordpress.text: Connect your CMS via Application Password — content gets published or saved as drafts automatically.

autopilot.title: Autopilot
autopilot.text: Scheduled publishing with an approve/reject queue and notifications.

steps.1: Describe your business in a 5-step wizard
steps.2: Upload a semantic core or build one from competitors
steps.3: Get a content plan with priorities and page types
steps.5: Publish to WordPress in one click — or enable autopilot

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay for tokens — no subscriptions, no hidden fees.
pricing.empty: Pricing is being set up. Come back later or contact us.

perks.payment: YooKassa payment or invoice for legal entities

pricing.footnote: Prices in rubles. Tokens don't expire and roll over. Invoicing is available for legal entities.

cta.title: Ready to automate SEO?
cta.body: Sign up and get 2,000 tokens as a gift — enough for your first content plan and a couple of articles.

demo.blocked: This is demo mode: changes aren't available. Sign up for full access.

onboarding.title: Let's set up your project
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us about your business so we can help you grow your search traffic.

company.aiAutoFillBody: Let AI fill this out using your domain.
company.aiAutoFillNeedsUrl: Provide a site URL (or your project URL) so AI can analyze it.
company.noProjectYet: I don't have my own project yet (I want to create my own website)
company.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about your business — what you do, what makes you unique, your key offerings…
company.geographyPlaceholder: e.g., United States, New York, Global
company.aiTipBody: The more detail you provide, the better our AI can generate relevant keywords and content for your business.

products.intro: List your main products or services. This helps AI generate relevant keywords.
products.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description — what is it, who is it for?

audience.aiBannerBody: Based on your business description, AI can suggest audience segments and pain points.
audience.segmentPlaceholder: Audience segment {n} — e.g., "Small business owners aged 30-50"
audience.painPointsLabel: What problems do your customers face?
audience.painPointPlaceholder: Pain point {n} — e.g., "Can't find affordable printing services"

dataSources.ownDomainHint: I have a website, analyze it.
dataSources.urlHintOwn: Enter your website URL. We'll analyze its structure, sitemap, and auto-fill your company details.
dataSources.urlHintCompetitor: Enter a competitor URL. We'll extract its sitemap and keyword structure.
dataSources.verifiedSuccessBody: We will parse your sitemap in the next steps.
dataSources.verifyError: Could not analyze this website. Please check the URL and try again.

competitors.intro: Add your competitors' websites. We'll analyze their structure, keywords, and content strategy to find opportunities for your SEO growth.
competitors.notesPlaceholder: Notes — what do they do well? Where are they weak?

structure.aiBody: We'll parse your website ({url}) and your competitors to propose the optimal URL structure and page types.
structure.needUrl: Please provide a website URL in Step 1.
structure.sectionsCount: {n, plural, one {# top-level section} other {# top-level sections}}

semanticCore.title: Semantic Core
semanticCore.subtitle: Analyze and cluster your keywords
semanticCore.subtitleLong: Manage your keyword clusters, build site structures, and link to projects.
semanticCore.noProjectHint: Select a project from the sidebar to view or create its semantic core.
semanticCore.noCoresHint: Start by creating your first semantic core for this project.
semanticCore.deleteConfirm: Delete this semantic core and all its keywords? This cannot be undone.

keywords.title: Keyword Grouping
keywords.subtitle: Paste your keywords (one per line) and we'll cluster them with N-gram lexical analysis.
keywords.scriptOnlyHint: Groups are built locally, so only representative queries (1 per group) are sent to the AI — cutting cost by up to 90%.
keywords.appendSuccess: Successfully added {added} new keywords ({skipped} duplicates skipped).
keywords.appendPlaceholder: Paste new keywords here to append to your existing semantic core…
keywords.newPlaceholder:
buy sneakers
buy nike sneakers
running shoes
best running shoes 2024
…

stat.compressionHint: Tokens saved vs sending all keywords

wizard.title: Semantic Core
wizard.subtitle: Build your keyword structure with AI clustering

categories.title: AI Categories
categories.subtitle: AI analyzes your keyword groups and suggests content categories. Review, edit, then approve.
categories.sessionFirst: Create a session first to begin uploading keywords.
categories.noGroupsYetPart1: No keyword groups found. Go to
categories.groupsReadyBody: Groups were built using a pure N-gram script — no AI used. This compresses your keyword list by ~{pct}% before sending it to the AI, saving tokens and reducing cost significantly.
categories.listIntro: {n} categories · edit names or delete unwanted ones
categories.compressBody: AI will merge similar or overlapping categories into one.
categories.approveBody: Approving locks the categories and enables categorization in Step 3.

results.title: Results
results.subtitle: Keyword → Category assignment
results.refineConfirm: Ask AI to refine "{name}"? This will move outliers to Uncategorized.
results.refineGood: Category looks good! No outliers found.
results.assignBody: Processes in batches of {n} groups using the selected model. You can stop at any time.
results.genPlanBody: Create rows from categories with page type, schema, and word count.
results.selectProjectWarn: Select a project from the sidebar to enable content plan generation.
results.tableEmpty: No results yet — complete Steps 1 & 2 first.

content.title: Content Manager
content.subtitle: View and manage all content for your project

editorPage.title: Content Editor
editorPage.subtitle: AI-generated SEO content
editorPage.topicPlaceholder: e.g. How to choose running shoes
editorPage.materialsBody: Add context so AI writes accurately
editorPage.writePlaceholder: Your content will appear here after generation, or write manually…

recommendations.reduceWatery: Reduce wateriness: remove filler words and vague statements
recommendations.improveUniqueness: Improve uniqueness: rewrite some passages to be more original
recommendations.addKeywords: Add more keyword mentions naturally throughout the text
recommendations.addInternals: Add more internal links and relevant examples

seo.emptyBody: Generate content first, then click "Analyze SEO"

content.emptyBodyFiltered: Try a different filter or clear the search.
content.emptyBody: Go to the Content Planner to create ideas and generate content.

contentPlanner.title: Content Planner

header.importCsvHint: Import content rows from CSV file

invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.instruction: Enter the email address. The invitee will receive a link and temporary password to access the content plan.
invite.createdWith: Invite created! Share this link with {email}:
invite.devNote: In dev mode the temporary password is printed in the server console. In production, it will be emailed automatically.

csv.title: Import CSV
csv.instruction: Upload a CSV file with columns like: Title, URL, Section, Page Type, Keywords, H1, H2, etc. Supports both English and Russian column headers.
csv.dropHere: Drop CSV file here or click to browse

keywordStats.label: Keyword Coverage
keywordStats.helpBody: Coverage is determined by partial phrase matching. A semantic core key phrase is counted as "covered" if it appears anywhere within the combined text of your Content Plan's Target Keywords, Titles, or H1s.
keywordStats.syncResult: ✓ Scanned {synced} keywords — {matched} matched to content items
keywordStats.syncTooltip: Scan content plan and update keyword usage counts

errors.noContentToAnalyze: No content to analyze. Generate content first.
errors.someEmpty: Some content rows do not have content. Create content first and then analyze.
errors.noValidToRegen: No valid content to regenerate. Generate and analyze first.
errors.someInvalidRegen: Some rows are missing content or analysis. Optimizing only valid rows.

contentPlanner.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {n} content items?

bulk.seoDataTitle: Generate SEO Data for selected rows
bulk.optimizeTitle: Regenerate based on analysis for selected rows

table.title: Title
table.noPages: No pages yet. Click "Add Row" to start.
table.duplicateTitle: A similar title already exists in your plan
table.actionGenLocked: Generate SEO data first (Title, Meta, H1, H2, Keywords)

draftRow.label: New
draftRow.fillMandatory: Fill mandatory fields to save row

footer.pagesPlanned: {n, plural, one {# page planned} other {# pages planned}}
footer.hintPrefix: Click any cell to edit · H2 headings separated by

ideation.title: Content Ideation & Planning
ideation.subtitle: Generate structured content plans using AI

manual.topicPlaceholder: e.g., Running shoes for flat feet
manual.pickRandom: Pick Random from Core (uses filter above)
manual.pickRandomHint: This action does not consume AI tokens
manual.noKeywords: Please paste at least one keyword.

deepSeo.title: Deep SEO Generation
deepSeo.body: Generate URLs, Meta Descriptions, H1s, H2s, and Tags for selected ideas.

results.duplicateTooltip: A similar title already exists in your plan
results.freeAddNote: Adding data to plan without generation does not consume tokens.

batch.label: Paste Keywords
batch.hint: Paste your keywords below, one per line. We will generate exactly one optimized article title for each keyword.

rss.title: RSS Feed Analysis
rss.body: Analyze competitor RSS feeds to extract their latest topics and generate counter-strategies.

chat.title: Neural Network Brainstorming
chat.body: Chat with the SEO AI to brainstorm silos and content architectures.
chat.empty: Start typing to interact with the AI...
chat.placeholder: e.g. 'Give me 5 article ideas for beginner runners...'

ideation.confirmAddWithoutSeo:
Some selected ideas are missing deep SEO data (like Meta Descriptions or H1s).

If you add them now, you'll need to manually fill them in later.

Do you want to continue without generating SEO data?

editor.confirmClose: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close without saving?

tabs.issuesTooltip: Spelling & SEO issues from Expert Analysis

issues.runFirst: Run Expert Analysis first to see issues
issues.noIssues: No issues found! Content looks good.
issues.mixedBody: Words with characters from different alphabets (e.g. Latin in Cyrillic text)

editor.noConnectors: No connectors. Add them in Project Settings.
editor.outdatedBody: The data is outdated due to changes in existing content.

metadata.title: SEO Metadata
metadata.generateTooltip: Generate missing SEO data (Slug, Category, Meta Description, H1, H2s, Keywords)

dashboard.welcomeBody: Your all-in-one SEO automation platform. Let's grow your search traffic.

semanticCore.title: Semantic Core
semanticCore.description: Analyze and cluster your keywords with AI

newProject.title: New Project
newProject.description: Set up a new website for SEO optimization

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.emptyBody: Create your first project to get started

projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyBody: Create your first project to start optimizing your website for search engines.

billing.title: Billing & tokens
billing.subtitle: Manage balance and top-ups
billing.notFoundBody: URL doesn't contain a payment ID.
billing.succeededBody: {tokens} tokens have been added to your balance.
billing.pendingTitle: Waiting for confirmation from the payment provider…
billing.pendingBody: This takes up to a minute. The page will refresh automatically.
billing.noPackages: Packages aren't set up yet. Contact support.
billing.noProviders: Payment methods aren't configured. Contact admin.

users.heading: Users ({n})
users.selectHint: Select a user to manage their balance

company.heading: Recipient company details
company.hint: Visible on the payment invoice generated by the user.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your SEO performance and search positions
analytics.comingSoonBody: Connect Yandex.Metrika, Google Search Console, and other services to track your SEO growth.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.intro: Connect external SEO analysis providers by adding your API keys. Keys are encrypted and stored securely.
apiKeys.securityNote: Your API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage. They are never displayed in full or transmitted in API responses.

textru.description: Russian-focused uniqueness & spam check. Used for Expert Analysis in Content Editor.

team.title: Team Members
team.subtitle: Manage team access across all your projects
team.upgradeFallback: Team management is available on paid plans.
team.devNote: In dev mode, the invite link and temporary password will be printed in the server console.
team.shareHint: Share the link and password with the invitee.

table.noMembersHint: Click "Invite Member" to add someone to your project.

team.revokedSummary: {n, plural, one {# revoked member} other {# revoked members}}

models.title: AI Models & Pricing
models.intro: Available AI models and their estimated costs in SEOSH tokens. Choose cheaper models for bulk operations and premium models for high-quality content.
models.per1kBody: blended cost in SEOSH tokens per 1,000 API tokens (average of input + output).
models.perArticleBody: estimated cost for a typical article (~2K prompt + ~3K output tokens). Actual cost depends on content length.

projectSettings.title: Project
projectSettings.subtitle: Read-only view of your project's configuration and established sitemap structure.
projectSettings.noProjectBody: Please select or create a project from the sidebar.

semanticCore.title: Semantic Core
semanticCore.noneBody: Create or link a semantic core to enable keyword-driven content planning.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.body: Permanently delete this project and all of its associated data, including content plans and settings.
danger.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project and all its data? This cannot be undone.

sitemap.title: Approved Structure of Website
sitemap.emptyBody: No approved structure has been generated. This is usually created during project setup.

connectors.title: Publishing Connectors
connectors.subtitle: Connect a CMS where autopilot will publish content.
connectors.wpUsernameHint: User who owns the Application Password

llmsTxt.title: llms.txt for your site
llmsTxt.description: A single-file site description for AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude). Download it and host at the root of your domain as /llms.txt so LLMs can understand your structure and topics without crawling the whole site.
llmsTxt.quickHint: Template-based rebuild without AI — free and instant.
llmsTxt.empty: Not generated yet. Pick a model and click Generate, or use the free quick rebuild.
llmsTxt.howto: How to use: upload the file via FTP or your hosting panel to the root of your site so it's reachable at https://your-site/llms.txt. Regenerate after major changes to products, structure or semantic core.

autopilotPage.title: Autopilot
autopilotPage.selectProject: Select a project to configure autopilot.
autopilotPage.needConnector: Add a CMS connector in <link>Project Settings</link> to enable autopilot.

connectors.title: CMS connectors
connectors.empty: No connectors. Add them in Project Settings.

queue.title: Content Queue
queue.empty: Queue is empty. Create a content plan in <link>Content Planner</link>.

telegram.title: Telegram approval
telegram.body: Send ready items to a Telegram chat with one-tap Approve / Reject buttons. Works only when Auto-Approve is off.
telegram.broken: Bot token no longer works — please reconnect.
telegram.configHint: Create a bot via <bot>@BotFather</bot>, copy the token, add the bot to your chat or open a private chat, then send any message to it. Get the chat id with <ud>@userinfobot</ud>.
telegram.autoApproveConflict: Auto-Approve is on — Telegram notifications are paused. Turn it off above to enable them.

invite.loadingBody: Please wait while we set up your access.
invite.successInstruction: Use your email and the temporary password from your invitation to sign in.

invoice.title: Invoice № {no}
invoice.noVatNote: VAT-free. Tokens are credited manually after the payment is received.
invoice.afterPaymentNote: After payment, send confirmation to {email} — tokens will be credited within one business day.
